objectSets.name: Set 1 — Foundation parents (no intra-set FK deps)

objects.query: SELECT Code, DataType, Description, Id, Name, Status, UnitOfMeasureId FROM AttributePicklist ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Abbreviation, Code, DisplayValue, Id, IsDefault, Name, PicklistId, Sequence, Status, Value FROM AttributePicklistValue ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT BaseUnitOfMeasureId, Code, DefaultUnitOfMeasureId, Description, Id, Name, Status, Type FROM UnitOfMeasureClass ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT ConversionFactor, Description, Id, Name, RoundingMethod, Scale, Sequence, Status, Type, UnitCode, UnitOfMeasureClassId FROM UnitOfMeasure ORDER BY UnitCode ASC

SELECT Code, DataType, DefaultHelpText, DefaultValue, Description, DeveloperName, Id, IsActive, IsRequired, Label, Name, PicklistId, SourceSystemIdentifier, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM AttributeDefinition ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code, Description, Id, Name FROM AttributeCategory ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code, Id, Name, ParentProductClassificationId, Status FROM ProductClassification ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT DoesAutoRenewAssetByDefault, Id, Name, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType, Status FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT ArePartialPeriodsAllowed, Id, Name, ProrationPolicyType, RemainderStrategy FROM ProrationPolicy
SELECT CatalogType, Code, Description, EffectiveEndDate, EffectiveStartDate, Id, Name FROM ProductCatalog ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT AssociatedProductRoleCat, Id, MainProductRoleCat, Name FROM ProductRelationshipType ORDER BY Name ASC

SELECT BasedOnId, CanRamp, ConfigureDuringSale, Description, DisplayUrl, Family, Id, IsActive, IsAssetizable, IsSoldOnlyWithOtherProds, Name, ProductCode, QuantityUnitOfMeasure, SpecificationType, StockKeepingUnit, Type, UnitOfMeasureId FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC

objectSets.name: Set 2 — First-level children (re-read Set 1 parents as Readonly)

objects.query: SELECT Code FROM AttributePicklist ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeDefinition ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeCategory ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductClassification ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name, SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT Name FROM ProrationPolicy ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductCatalog ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name FROM ProductRelationshipType ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT UnitCode FROM UnitOfMeasure ORDER BY UnitCode ASC
SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, Id FROM AttributeCategoryAttribute ORDER BY AttributeCategory.Code ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeNameOverride, DefaultValue, Description, DisplayType, HelpText, Id, IsHidden, IsPriceImpacting, IsReadOnly, IsRequired, MaximumCharacterCount, MaximumValue, MinimumCharacterCount, MinimumValue, Name, ProductClassificationId, Sequence, Status, StepValue, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM ProductClassificationAttr ORDER BY ProductClassification.Code ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC, AttributeCategory.Code ASC, Name ASC

SELECT Id, IsDefault, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, ProrationPolicyId, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModelOption ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType ASC

SELECT DurationType, Id, Name, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, SegmentType, TrialDuration FROM ProductRampSegment ORDER BY Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType ASC, SegmentType ASC
SELECT Code, Description, Id, MaxBundleComponents, MinBundleComponents, Name, ParentProductId, Sequence FROM ProductComponentGroup ORDER BY ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, Code ASC
SELECT CatalogId, Code, Description, Id, IsNavigational, Name, ParentCategoryId, SortOrder FROM ProductCategory ORDER BY Catalog.Code ASC, ParentCategory.Code ASC, Name ASC

objectSets.name: Set 3 — Second-level children (re-read Set 2 parents as Readonly)

objects.query: SELECT StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductCategory ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductCatalog ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductComponentGroup ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name FROM ProductRelationshipType ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT Name, SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModel ORDER BY Name ASC, SellingModelType ASC
SELECT Code FROM ProductClassification ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Name FROM ProductClassificationAttr ORDER BY Name ASC
SELECT UnitCode FROM UnitOfMeasure ORDER BY UnitCode ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeDefinition ORDER BY Code ASC
SELECT Code FROM AttributeCategory ORDER BY Code ASC

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeNameOverride, DefaultValue, Description, DisplayType, HelpText, Id, IsHidden, IsPriceImpacting, IsReadOnly, IsRequired, MaximumCharacterCount, MaximumValue, MinimumCharacterCount, MinimumValue, Name, OverriddenProductAttributeDefinitionId, Product2Id, ProductClassificationAttributeId, Sequence, Status, StepValue, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM ProductAttributeDefinition ORDER BY Product2.StockKeepingUnit ASC, AttributeCategory.Code ASC, AttributeDefinition.Code ASC, ProductClassificationAttribute.Name ASC

SELECT ChildProductClassificationId, ChildProductId, ChildProductRole, ChildSellingModelId, DoesBundlePriceIncludeChild, Id, IsComponentRequired, IsDefaultComponent, IsQuantityEditable, MaxQuantity, MinQuantity, ParentProductId, ParentProductRole, ParentSellingModelId, ProductComponentGroupId, ProductRelationshipTypeId, Quantity, QuantityScaleMethod, QuoteVisibility, Sequence, UnitOfMeasureId FROM ProductRelatedComponent ORDER BY ChildProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit ASC, ProductComponentGroup.Code ASC, ProductRelationshipType.Name ASC
SELECT CatalogId, Id, IsPrimaryCategory, ProductCategoryId, ProductId FROM ProductCategoryProduct ORDER BY ProductCategory.Code ASC, Product.StockKeepingUnit ASC, Catalog.Code ASC
SELECT EffectiveFromDate, EffectiveToDate, Id, IsQualified, Name, ParentProductId, ProductId, RootProductId FROM ProductQualification
SELECT Id, EffectiveFromDate, EffectiveToDate, IsDisqualified, Name, ParentProductId, ProductId, Reason, RootProductId FROM ProductDisqualification
SELECT Id, CategoryId, EffectiveFromDate, EffectiveToDate, IsDisqualified, Name, Reason FROM ProductCategoryDisqual
SELECT Id, CategoryId, EffectiveFromDate, EffectiveToDate, IsQualified, Name FROM ProductCategoryQualification
SELECT Id, Name, Scope, UsageType FROM ProdtAttrScope
